creator: robert.ayrapetyan@gmail.com
text:
I've switched to Firefox-ESR (47) few months ago, it worked fine, no problems at all. This morning I switched back to mainstream version (49) and it started to "hang" again.

>Which video driver do you use? Try a basic one like scfb or vesa. Otherwise, >rebuild world and ports with just debug symbols (i.e. *not* DEBUG option) and >get a backtrace.

radeonkms.
Firefox doesn't crash, no core dumps produced. I can switch between tabs (window title changes), but I can't navigate on any page, they are "blinking" and doesn't scroll etc. I can see a "frozen" content of one (last opened) page on all tabs.
I'll try to switch to vesa driver and see, thanks.
